title: tectaria malayensis
intro: Tectaria malayensis, also known as the Malay lace fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Tectaria malayensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming Tectaria malayensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water.
